offer.what: Video speed dating app — users join live 5-minute face-to-face video calls with compatible singles, then mutually Like or Pass; matched users unlock messaging, in-app games, and social chat rooms
offer.coreOutcome: Genuine romantic connections without swipe fatigue — chemistry is felt in 5 minutes of video, not 50 text messages
offer.pricePoint: Freemium $0/mo (1 speed date/day, no card required) | Pro $30/mo (25 speed dates/day, messaging, icebreaker activities) | Premium $50/mo (unlimited dates, social rooms, games, advanced analytics)
leadMagnets: Free freemium tier — 1 video speed date per day, no credit card required

audience.icp: Singles aged ~22–38 who are burned out on swipe-based dating apps (Tinder, Bumble, Hinge) and want authentic, low-stakes face-to-face connection before investing time in someone
painPoints: Swipe fatigue — hours wasted on profiles that never lead anywhere
Ghosting and low-commitment texting that reveals nothing about real chemistry
Catfishing and misrepresentation behind static photos
Algorithmic matching that feels impersonal and gamified
Awkward first dates with total strangers
segments: Swipe-fatigued millennials (28–38) ready for something real
Gen Z daters (22–27) comfortable with video-first interaction
People returning to dating after a long-term relationship
Early adopters / beta testers interested in novel dating formats

salesCycle.length: Same day — self-serve signup in 2 minutes, free first date immediately
salesCycle.trial: Yes — freemium tier with 1 video speed date/day, no credit card required; natural upgrade trigger when daily limit is hit
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Self-serve upgrade prompt when free-tier cap is reached; in-app paywall at 1 date/day ceiling; email nurture for unconverted free users
salesCycle.topObjection: Video anxiety / fear of being on camera with a stranger; uncertainty about whether they'll match with anyone; newness of the format

ahaMoment: First mutual match — the moment both people tap Like after a live 5-minute video call and see the 'It's a Match!' screen; typically within the first 1–3 sessions

retention.recurring: Monthly subscription (Pro $30, Premium $50); free tier creates habit loop before conversion
retention.expansion: Freemium → Pro → Premium; Premium adds social chat rooms, post-match games, advanced analytics
retention.churnRisk: No match in early sessions (expectation mismatch), video call anxiety causing drop-off before first date, inactivity after a match if post-match messaging stalls

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — new signups need guidance on how to set up a compelling profile, join their first session, and understand the 5-min format
Lead-Magnet / Freemium Nurture — free users capping out at 1 date/day need a conversion sequence showing the Pro/Premium value
Trial-to-Paid Conversion — no formal trial-conversion email sequence evident; critical given freemium model
Session Reminders & No-Show — users who register for a session need pre-session reminder and re-engagement if they don't show
Value Newsletter — dating tips, success stories ('Our matches'), and community content to drive habit and brand love
Renewal & Expansion — monthly renewal reminder, upsell from Pro to Premium when engagement is high
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — inactive free or lapsed paid users; 'You have X unread matches' style reactivation
toneVoice: Warm, playful, and emotionally direct — leans into the frustration of swipe culture with a knowing wink, then pivots to genuine optimism about real connection. Conversational, never corporate. Encouraging without being cheesy. Think: a cool friend who's genuinely excited you might find someone.
compliance: 18+ age verification required (gate on all site entry); 256-bit SSL encryption; end-to-end data protection; US-based support; standard CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliance expected; adult dating platform — avoid making health/relationship outcome guarantees; refund policy page exists
